Problem: Stale IOSApneaCompanionTests expected Snorkeling unavailable on iOS
Root_Cause: Test predates Command 08 iOS Snorkeling companion availability
Fix_Summary: Renamed to testApneaAndSnorkelingSelectionAvailableOnIOSCompanion; asserts both activities launchable on iOS Companion
Acceptance_Criteria: Test passes without weakening product behavior

Problem: ApneaSuspendResumeLifecycleIntegrationTests failed — dives not committed after restore
Root_Cause: sessionClock anchored to system uptime at init while tests use synthetic uptime; diveStartedAt scale mismatch vs export-normalized checkpoint
Fix_Summary: armSession resets sessionClock; checkpoint stores/restores lifecycleConfiguration and recoveryPolicy; clear lastMeasurementMonotonic on restore; sync active dive tracker
Acceptance_Criteria: Same session/dive IDs after suspend/resume; no duplicate dives; idempotent restore

Fix_Summary: No software claim of physical QA completion

Problem: No integrated E2E automation across four modes

Problem: XcodeGen race when validators run concurrently
Root_Cause: Each validator invoked xcodegen generate independently
Fix_Summary: Serialized generate with project.yml stamp and lock; child validators skip via DIR_DIVING_SKIP_XCODEGEN
Acceptance_Criteria: Integrated validation completes without project corruption
Residual_Risk: Low if CI runs validators in parallel without helper
